prompt: Edit image 1: Change the camera perspective to first-person. Re-render the scene looking out over the clouds, adopting the first-person viewpoint and camera style characteristic of image 2's genre.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to change the camera perspective to a first-person view. Re-render the scene looking out over the vast cloud sea from the cliff edge, adopting the immersive first-person viewpoint and camera characteristics (such as the presence of foreground elements like hands or a weapon) typical of image 2's first-person shooter genre.
objects: characters from Image 1 (should not be present)
